title: grackle WebSocket messages
description: Wire format for agent ↔ browser WebSocket communication. Unknown message types MUST be silently ignored by all consumers.

WsEnvelope.description: Base envelope — every wire message shares this shape.

id.description: Correlation ID, echoed verbatim in any reply.

type.description: Message discriminator. Open string — consumers MUST ignore unknown types.

payload.description: Message-specific data. Shape depends on type.

PingMessage.description: Heartbeat sent by the browser. Agent replies with PongMessage.

ping_id.description: The id of the PingMessage this responds to.
